title: IEA warns of 'the largest energy security threat in history'; global oil supply plummets 10.1 mb/d
snippet: IEA April Oil Market Report: global oil supply plummeted 10.1 mb/d to 97 mb/d in March. Hormuz shipments down from 20+ mb/d to 3.8 mb/d. Physical crude near $150/bbl. Middle distillates in Singapore above $290/bbl. Global demand to decline 80 kb/d in 2026. Middle East refineries cut runs by 6 mb/d.
tag_reason: 신규 — IEA 4월 석유시장보고서 발표는 4/14 신규 이벤트
